search.query: | metadata type=hosts index=main | dedup host | table host
index=main sourcetype=jmx $host$ | dedup jvmDescription | table jvmDescription

index=main sourcetype=jmx $host$ $jvmDescription$ mbean_domain="java.lang" mbean_property_type="Threading"| bucket _time span=1m | stats max(count) as currentThreads ,max(peak) as peakThreads, max(daemonCount) as daemonThreads first(started) as threadsStarted earliest(currentUserTime) as currentThreadUserTime earliest(currentCPUTime) as currentThreadCpuTime by _time host jvmDescription

stats first(threadsStarted) as "Threads Started" first(currentThreadUserTime) as "Current Thread User Time" first(currentThreadCpuTime) as "Current Thread CPU Time" first(currentThreads) as "Thread Count" first(peakThreads) as "Peak Thread Count" first(daemonThreads) as "Daemon Thread Count" by host jvmDescription
timechart max(currentThreads) as "Current Threads" max(peakThreads) as "Peak Threads" max(daemonThreads) as "Daemon Threads" by jvmDescription
